text.title: Cassandra Wide-Column Modeling Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply nosql-cassandra-patterns end-to-end.

step.name: list-access-patterns
step.action: Write each query shape + QPS + latency budget.

step.name: table-per-pattern
step.action: One table (or MV) per pattern; no secondary indexes.

step.name: size-and-validate
step.action: Estimate per-partition size; cap <100 MB / 100k rows.
